name: AnyDesk

extraction.note: Find the first line matching '(macOS)', capture the version number before it

changelog.note: Plain text changelog grouped by version number. Lists all OS changes interspersed — filter lines between version headers for macOS-specific changes.

release_date.note: Last-Modified header is the best date proxy — changelog text does not include dates

notes: anydesk.com main site is behind Cloudflare anti-bot protection. The changelog.txt endpoint is NOT protected and is the only reliable programmatic source for version info. DMG URL is a static redirect to latest; no version in URL path.
